items.question: Who are your services suitable for?
items.answer: Our services are designed for Chinese communities in Australia, international students, and the wider East Asian community. Whether you are a recent graduate, an early-career job seeker, or a working professional looking to switch industries or advance your career in Australia, we can create a service plan that suits you.

items.question: My English is not very strong. Will that affect the results?
items.answer: Not necessarily. Our team works fluently in both Chinese and English, and consultations and training can be conducted in Chinese throughout the process. We also provide resume optimization and interview coaching based on your English level so you can present yourself to Australian employers in the most effective way.

items.question: Can you guarantee that I will get an offer?
items.answer: We do not make unrealistic promises, but we do everything we can to strengthen your competitiveness. From resume enhancement and skills training to job matching, every step is supported by professional consultants. Historically, our clients' interview and placement success rates have been far higher than applying on their own.

items.question: How long does the service usually take?
items.answer: It depends on the individual. Resume enhancement usually takes 3 to 5 business days. Career planning can be delivered as a one-off or phased service. A full journey from training to placement generally takes around 1 to 3 months, depending on your target role and personal situation.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: We offer a free initial consultation, after which we provide a tailored plan and quotation based on your needs. Pricing varies by service, and all fees are explained transparently after the consultation with no hidden charges.

items.question: Are the roles you recommend genuine?
items.answer: Yes. All roles we recommend come from real companies that have established partnerships with us. We do not mass-apply or make random recommendations. Every role is reviewed by our consultants to ensure it aligns with your background and goals.

items.question: I am still studying. Can I start preparing now?
items.answer: Absolutely. The earlier you begin career planning, the smoother your job search will be after graduation. While studying, you can start with career direction assessment, join training programs, and build internship experience so your resume is already ahead of many peers by the time you graduate.

items.question: Can I get a refund if I am not satisfied after the consultation?
items.answer: We are confident in the quality of our service. The initial consultation is completely free, and before any formal service begins we clearly define the scope and expected goals. If you are ever dissatisfied, you can speak with us at any time and we will work with you on an appropriate solution based on the situation.
